data.title: New Hampshire House Approves Bitcoin Reserve Bill
data.description: According to Odaily, the New Hampshire House of Representatives has passed a bill concerning Bitcoin reserves. This legislative move marks a significant step in the state's approach to cryptocurrency regulation and adoption. The bill's approval reflects growing interest and recognition of digital currencies within governmental frameworks.

data.title: New Hampshire House Passes Bitcoin Reserve Bill
data.description: New Hampshire House of Representatives passes Bitcoin Reserve Act. (Bitcoin Magazine)

data.title: Silk Road creator Ross Ulbricht to make first public appearance at Bitcoin conference
data.description:
Until his pardon, Ulbricht was serving a life sentence without the possibility of parole for creating and operating Silk Road.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350453/silk-road-creator-ross-ulbricht-to-make-first-public-appearance-at-bitcoin-conference?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bitpanda secures third MiCA license, expanding regulatory reach across Europe
data.description:
Bitpanda has obtained its third license under the European Union’s Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) from Austria’s Financial Market Authority (FMA).
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitpanda-secures-third-mica-license/

data.title: TRON amasses $900 million in fees in just 4 months
data.description:
As the broader crypto market battles volatility driven by escalating trade tensions, TRON (TRX) is experiencing record network demand.
source: https://finbold.com/tron-amasses-900-million-in-fees-in-just-4-months/

data.title: House of Doge Partners With 21Shares To Launch Dogecoin Foundation-Endorsed DOGE ETP
data.description:
The official corporate arm of the Dogecoin Foundation is partnering with one of the world’s leading producers of crypto exchange-traded products (ETPs) on a new Dogecoin (DOGE) product. In a new press release, 21Shares and House of Doge are announcing their new partnership to launch DOGE ETPs globally.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/10/house-of-doge-partners-with-21shares-to-launch-dogecoin-foundation-endorsed-doge-etp/

data.title: ChatGPT Gets Total Recall: OpenAI's Memory Upgrade Remembers Your Whole Chat History
data.description:
OpenAI’s ChatGPT can now reference all past conversations to create more personalized responses—which is both convenient and scary.
source: https://decrypt.co/314380/chatgpt-total-recall-openai-memory-upgrade

data.title: New York AG warns Congress of non-US stablecoin issuers like Tether amid legislation talks
data.description:
AG Letitia James recommended stablecoins should be both backed 1:1 by U. S. dollars or treasuries and issued by American companies.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350445/new-york-ag-warns-congress-of-non-us-stablecoin-issuers-like-tether-amid-legislation-talks?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Jack Dorsey's Block fined $40M for alleged crypto compliance, AML failures
data.description:
Digital payments company Block Inc. has reached a $40 million settlement with New York regulators over alleged compliance misconducts tied to its Cash App platform, Bloomberg reported on April 10. Block was fined by the New York Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) following an investigation into Cash App’s Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and cryptocurrency compliance operations, Bloomberg said after reviewing the government agency’s consent order.  NYDFS determined that Block allegedly violated consumer protection laws and didn’t conduct proper due diligence on its customers
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/jack-dorsey-block-inc-fined-nydfs?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Exclusive: Ripple CLO wants to break the ‘crypto bro’ stereotype
data.description:
Stuart Alderoty says the National Cryptocurrency Association aims to replace crypto confusion with clarity—and dismantle outdated stereotypes along the way.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/innovation/ripple-lawyer-says-he-wants-to-break-the-crypto-bro-stereotype
